terms.definition: Another word for a variable — the association between a name and a value.
An immutable value that is not an object: string, number, boolean, null, undefined, bigint, symbol.
A value (object, array, function) accessed via a reference to its location in memory.
JavaScript moving declarations to the top of their scope during compilation.
Automatic conversion of a value from one type to another.
The region of code where a variable is accessible.
